---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe:
- What pain point does this solve?
- Who benefits from this feature?
- Why is this important?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see, including:
- High-level approach
- Key user interactions
- Technical considerations
- API changes (if any)

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or features you've considered:
- Alternative 1: [description]
- Alternative 2: [description]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this feature doesn't already exist
- [ ] I have described the problem and solution clearly
- [ ] I have considered technical feasibility and dependencies

---

**Tip**: Before submitting a feature request, consider whether it aligns with the project's goals and scope. Small, focused enhancements are more likely to be implemented.
